Class AbstractCounterExampleGenerator

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen.smt.counterexample.AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractSideProofCounterExampleGenerator
public abstract class AbstractCounterExampleGenerator extends Object
Implementations of this class are used find a counter example for a given Sequent using the SMT solver SolverTypes.Z3_CE_SOLVER.

This class provides the full logic independent from the a user interface. Subclasses are used to realize the user interface specific functionality.

When searchCounterExample(UserInterfaceControl, Proof, Sequent) is called a new Proof is instantiated by createProof(UserInterfaceControl, Proof, Sequent, String). Next the macro SemanticsBlastingMacro is performed on the new Proof and when done the SMT solver is started. The progress of the SMT solver and the final result can be observed by a SolverLauncherListener instantiated. by createSolverListener(DefaultSMTSettings, Proof).

  • Method Details

    • isSolverAvailable

      public static boolean isSolverAvailable()
      Checks if the required SMT solver is available.
      Returns:
      true solver is available, false solver is not available.

    • searchCounterExample

      public void searchCounterExample(UserInterfaceControl ui, Proof oldProof, Sequent oldSequent) throws ProofInputException, InterruptedException
      Searches a counter example for the given Sequent.
      Parameters:
      ui - The UserInterfaceControl to use.
      oldProof - The old Proof used as template to instantiate a new one.
      oldSequent - The Sequent to find a counter example for.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
      InterruptedException

    • createProof

      protected abstract Proof createProof(UserInterfaceControl ui, Proof oldProof, Sequent oldSequent, String proofName) throws ProofInputException
      Creates a new Proof.
      Parameters:
      ui - The UserInterfaceControl to use.
      oldProof - The old Proof used as template to instantiate a new one.
      oldSequent - The Sequent to find a counter example for.
      proofName - The name for the new proof.
      Returns:
      The created Proof.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Ocurred Exception

    • createNewSequent

      protected Sequent createNewSequent(Sequent oldSequent)
      Creates the Sequent for the new Proof created by createProof(UserInterfaceControl, Proof, Sequent, String).
      Parameters:
      oldSequent - The Sequent to find a counter example for.
      Returns:
      The new Sequent.

    • semanticsBlastingCompleted

      protected void semanticsBlastingCompleted(UserInterfaceControl ui)
      This method is called after the SemanticsBlastingMacro has been executed.
      Parameters:
      ui - The UserInterfaceControl to use.

    • createSolverListener

      protected abstract SolverLauncherListener createSolverListener(DefaultSMTSettings settings, Proof proof)
      Creates the SolverLauncherListener which handles the results of the launched SMT solver.
      Parameters:
      settings - The DefaultSMTSettings.
      proof - The Proof on which the SMT solver will be performed.
      Returns:
      The SolverLauncherListener to use.
